ja: 町外れに現れたゴブリンの群れを討つ。移動・地形・包囲・支援・間接・占領——戦術の基礎を、隊長と新兵の初陣を通してひとつずつ学ぶ、旅立ちの章。
en: Drive the goblin band from the town's edge. Movement, terrain, encirclement, support, indirect fire, capture — learn the fundamentals one battle at a time, through a captain and his green recruit's first campaign.

ja: 墓地から湧き出すアンデッドとの戦い。魔法ユニット、輸送、陣形スキルを駆使して墓地に潜む邪悪を殲滅する第二の章。
en: Push back the dead welling from the graveyard and cut down the necromancer behind it all. The long reach of battle-mages, transport by wagon and airship, and Senaris's signature formation skills — Triple Chant, Sacred Aegis, Divine Judgment — brought together by a joint company of knights, clergy, and mages: the second chapter.
